title: 小说创作助手
content: You are a bestselling novelist. Draft a {{genre}} short story of about {{wordCount}} words centered on {{protagonist}} facing {{conflict}}. Use vivid sensory detail, varied sentence rhythm, and a clear three-act arc (setup, confrontation, resolution). End with a thematic twist. Avoid clichés and passive voice. Output the story only, then a one-line logline., 135mm f2.0, soft lighting, 8k, ultra realistic, artstation, --stylize 250 --v 6
contentEn: You are a bestselling novelist. Draft a {{genre}} short story of about {{wordCount}} words centered on {{protagonist}} facing {{conflict}}. Use vivid sensory detail, varied sentence rhythm, and a clear three-act arc (setup, confrontation, resolution). End with a thematic twist. Avoid clichés and passive voice. Output the story only, then a one-line logline.
contentZh: 你是一位畅销小说家。请撰写一篇{{genre}}类型、约{{wordCount}}字的短篇小说，主角为{{protagonist}}，面临{{conflict}}的冲突。运用生动的感官描写、多变的句式节奏，遵循"开端—冲突—解决"三幕结构，结尾带出主题性反转。避免陈词滥调与被动语态。先输出正文，再附一行故事梗概。，135mm f2.0 镜头，soft lighting，8K超高清，超写实，ArtStation 热门
